mod.fpcameraheight.name: First Person Camera Height
fpcameraheight.config.title: First Person Camera Height
fpcameraheight.config.enabled.tooltip: Toggle the camera height offset on or off
fpcameraheight.config.offset.tooltip: Adjusts the first person camera height. Does not affect hitbox or server position.
fpcameraheight.config.debug.tooltip: Prints FPCH sync events to the game log. Useful for troubleshooting. Leave off in normal use.
